info.description: Unified test intelligence platform — aggregate, analyze and act on test results from any CI/CD pipeline.
info.title: Fern Platform API

get.description: Returns the audit log of administrative actions (admin only)

post.description: Triggers garbage collection and other cleanup operations (admin only)

get.description: Returns the health status of system dependencies such as the database (admin only)
Returns runtime memory, CPU, and goroutine statistics (admin only)

post.description: Creates a new test run record (admin only)
Deletes multiple test runs by ID in a single request (admin only)

delete.description: Permanently deletes a test run by ID (admin only)

put.description: Updates the status of a test run (admin only)

get.description: Returns all users in the system (admin only)
Returns a specific user by ID (admin only)

delete.description: Permanently removes a user account (admin only)

post.description: Re-activates a suspended user account (admin only)

put.description: Changes the role of a user (admin only)

post.description: Suspends a user account, preventing login (admin only)

get.description: Returns tests detected as intermittently failing for a project

parameters.description: Project ID to query flaky tests for
parameters.name: projectId

post.description: Suppresses alerts for a detected flaky test
Marks a detected flaky test as resolved

get.description: Returns the health status, timestamp, service name, and version
Returns a paginated list of all accessible projects

post.description: Creates a new project (manager or admin only)

get.description: Explicit lookup by project ID string (avoids numeric ID ambiguity)
get.summary: Get a project by project ID

get.description: Returns a project by its project ID string

put.description: Updates project metadata (manager or admin only)

delete.description: Permanently deletes a project and its data (manager or admin only)

post.description: Marks a project as active so it accepts new test runs

get.description: Returns all JIRA connections configured for a project

post.description: Configures a JIRA integration for a project (manager or admin only)

put.description: Updates name, URL, or project key for a JIRA connection (manager or admin only)

delete.description: Permanently removes a JIRA connection from a project (manager or admin only)

put.description: Replaces the authentication type and credential for a JIRA connection (manager or admin only)

post.description: Verifies that the stored credentials can reach JIRA (manager or admin only)
Adds an individual spec (test case) result to a suite run (streaming reporter API)

parameters.description: Spec run data (suiteRunId, specName, status, startTime, endTime, duration, errorMessage, stackTrace, retries)
parameters.name: body

post.description: Adds a suite run to an existing test run (streaming reporter API)

parameters.description: Suite run data (testRunId, suiteName, status, startTime, endTime, duration, totalSpecs, passedSpecs, failedSpecs)
parameters.name: body

get.description: Returns an aggregated test summary for a project, optionally grouped by one or more dimensions
Returns all available tags
Returns a tag looked up by its name
Returns up to N tags; usage counts are not yet implemented and will be 0

parameters.description: Maximum number of tags to return (default 10)
parameters.name: limit

get.description: Returns usage statistics for all tags
Returns a single tag by ID
Returns a paginated list of test runs, optionally filtered by project

post.description: Submits a complete test run with suite and spec results in a single call. Compatible with the legacy Fern Reporter API.

get.description: Returns a test run looked up by its string run ID
get.summary: Get a test run by run ID string

post.description: Marks a running test run as finished and records final counts and status

parameters.description: Completion data (runId, status, endTime, totalTests, passedTests, failedTests, skippedTests)
parameters.name: body

get.description: Returns the total number of test runs, optionally filtered by project
Returns the N most recent test runs for a project

post.description: Creates a new test run in running state. Use with completeTestRun for streaming reporters.

parameters.description: Test run start data (projectId, runId, branch, commitSha, environment, tags, metadata)
parameters.name: body

get.description: Returns pass/fail counts and average duration for a project

parameters.description: Number of days to look back (default 30)
parameters.name: days

get.description: Returns a single test run by its numeric ID
get.summary: Get a test run by ID

put.description: Updates a test run by ID (not yet implemented)

get.description: Returns all suite runs belonging to a test run
get.summary: List suite runs for a test run

get.description: Returns a specific suite run belonging to a test run
Returns all spec runs within a suite run
Returns a specific spec run within a suite run

post.description: Associates a list of tag names with a test run (not yet persisted — returns success without saving)
post.summary: Assign tags to a test run

get.description: Returns the preferences for the currently authenticated user

put.description: Updates preferences for the currently authenticated user

get.description: Returns all projects the currently authenticated user has access to
Returns the profile of the currently authenticated user
